1 Pair Universal Garden Gloves Unisex One Size, Hi-Vis Dot Knit Grip

If you’re someone who works with their hands, whether on home projects or renovations or at work, you understand the importance of a good pair of work gloves to protect your hands and nails. And, besides avoiding cuts, scrapes or unwanted chemical burns, these safety glove takes hand protection to the next level, both enhancing your visibility and ensuring thorough hand protection when and where needed.

Key Features

  • HI VIS KNIT SAFETY AND WORK GLOVES: One size fits all, seamless knit construction safety work gloves in hi vis neon orange color are perfect for working on construction sites, in poorly lit areas or on road construction projects during the daytime or nighttime where hand protection and high visibility are a necessity
  • PVC DOT DESIGN FOR SOLID GRIP: These work gloves feature a dotted PVC synthetic silicone design on the palm for excellent grip, adding an additional layer of protection, dexterity and strength when moving, lifting or reorganizing items, materials or tools
  • COMFORTABLE STRETCH FIT: The seamless knit fabric construction of these work gloves or safety gloves are easy to take on and off; due to the stretch knit material, these work gloves provide the maximum amount of comfort and dexterity when working with your hands on the job or on projects around the house
  • MULTIPURPOSE WORK GLOVES: Aside from making great safety gloves or utility work gloves, they are also be used for a multitude of other tasks: fishing, gardening, painting, welding, cleaning and landscaping to name a just a few, protecting your hands and nails from slivers, blisters, chemical spills, burns, abrasions, allergic reactions, bites, cuts and scrapes
  • MACHINE WASHABLE: To keep work gloves clean, turn them inside out, launder on a cool wash cycle and air dry

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UTHIVSOGWRKGL
  • UPC: 855569004699
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: One Size

Featuring a comfortable, stretch-knit fabric, seamless construction and a PVC dot design for extra grip, these high visibility safety gloves or all-purpose, general utility work gloves assure that if you’re at work on a construction site, working roadside, at an airport or the like, you remain protected and easily visible. The hi-vis neon orange coloring allows your coworkers or those in your surrounding area help to greatly improve the recognition of your movements and whereabouts.

While these knit PVC dot grip work gloves are intended for workplace safety in commercial settings, they really are an all-purpose, general utility work glove for men and women alike. The work gloves can be worn for all kinds of general labor or for pesky projects around the house so, keep them with your tools and toolbox to wear for gardening, painting, landscaping, welding, for mechanical work, or even for fishing, to protect your hands and nails from unforeseen external elements.

Whatever back-breaking, sweat-inducing work you’re taking on, it’s is tough enough as it is without adding abrasions, allergic reactions or chemical burns to the mix. Insert a comfortable, durable, and hi-vis pair of safety gloves here, so you can take on home or work tasks day or night without injuries, al while increasing your safety and staying visible.
